content:
✔ Yes, a structured Gold/Silver/Bronze ranking.
✔ Instructor and students vote on the most helpful peer reviews.

🏅 Ranking System
• Gold (Master Reviewer): Demonstrates deep analysis, structure, and constructive feedback.
• Silver (Strong Reviewer): Thoughtful but missing some analytical depth.
• Bronze (Basic Reviewer): Minimal effort, vague or unhelpful.

🏆 Rewards:
• Top reviewers get XP bonuses.
• Gold reviewers earn an extra edit request from the professor.

✅ Why This Works:
• Motivates students to give better feedback.
• Improves the overall quality of peer review.
• Prevents half-hearted “I like your paper” responses.

7️⃣ Additional Discussion Thread: Reflection on Previous Week

✔ Yes, we will add a “Course Reflection Thread” to assess student engagement.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 29 (chunk 29/555)
